# Drafinity LLC

> Drafinity LLC is a USA-certified architectural drafting, 3D rendering, BIM modeling, structural drafting, and plan stamping firm headquartered in Albuquerque, New Mexico, serving all 50 US states since 2015. We deliver permit-ready, code-compliant plans for residential, commercial, and industrial projects with AI-enhanced workflows for faster turnaround.

## Company Facts
- **Legal name**: Drafinity LLC
- **Founded**: 2015
- **Headquarters**: 1209 Mountain Road Pl NE, Albuquerque, NM 87110, USA
- **Service area**: All 50 United States
- **Phone**: +1 (917) 728-1625
- **Email**: info@drafinity.us
- **Website**: https://drafinity.us
- **Business hours**: Mon–Fri 9 AM – 6 PM, Sat 10 AM – 4 PM (MT)
- **Projects completed**: 500+
- **Client satisfaction**: 100%
- **Quote turnaround**: Free quote within 24 hours

## Services
- 2D Architectural Drafting (floor plans, elevations, sections, site plans, as-builts)
- 3D Modeling & Photorealistic Rendering (V-Ray, Lumion, Enscape)
- BIM Modeling in Autodesk Revit (LOD 100–500), clash detection, BIM 360
- Structural Drafting (foundations, framing, steel, concrete, wood) — stamped by licensed PEs
- MEP Drafting (mechanical, electrical, plumbing, HVAC load calcs)
- Plan Stamping & Permit Expediting in all 50 US states
- Construction Documents (permit-ready, IBC/IRC/ADA compliant)
- Material Estimation & Quantity Takeoffs
- Interior Design & Visualization
- AI-Enhanced Generative Design & Automated Code Checking

## Software & Tools We Use
AutoCAD, Revit, ArchiCAD, SketchUp, 3ds Max, V-Ray, Lumion, Enscape, BIM 360, Navisworks, Bluebeam, ETABS, SAP2000, RISA-3D, STAAD.Pro, Tekla Structures, Civil 3D, MicroStation.

## Why Choose Drafinity
- Licensed architects and Professional Engineers (PEs) in all 50 states
- 100% permit-ready, code-compliant deliverables
- Free quotes delivered within 24 hours
- AI-augmented workflows deliver projects up to 3× faster
- 500+ successful projects, 100% client satisfaction since 2015
- Transparent communication and dedicated project managers
